steps.description: @assertion there's "How can I help you today?" exist.
Click on the "Type a message" text box in the Microsoft Teams chat interface to begin typing a message.
Type the text 'get repairs assign karin' into the message input field within the chatbot interface of the Microsoft Teams app (vsuse_app_Ocq3ndev tab).
Click the "Send" button in the Microsoft Teams chat interface to send the message "get repairs assign karin."
@assertion there's "How can I help you today?" not exist.
Click the red "View prompts" button at the bottom-right corner of the Teams chat interface to open the prompt options.
Press the "Home" key to navigate to the top of the conversation feed in the Microsoft Teams chat interface.
